html:
Exclusive to:

The Swinesbury City Hall is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in Swinesbury Pig City and sells a variety of permits and contracts to the player.

Interior

Upon entering the Swinesbury City Hall, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. Additionally, Mayor Truffleston wanders around the room.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the City Hall which will be restocked by the Mayor except for the Deed of home ownership:

Item Name
Deed of home ownership 50
House Expansion Permit 50
Demolition Permit 10
Security Contract 10

My City Hall

Upon obtaining the Key to the City in the Palace, the player will be able to craft their own City Hall. It is found in the City Planning Tab, and requires four Boards, four Gold Nuggets and four Pig Skins to craft. Building a City Hall will allow the player to become the Mayor of their own Pig City.

Interior

The structure's interior will be similar to the Mayor Truffleston's house, except for the selling displays not being present. Similar to the Slanty Shanty, one may build Structures within their City Hall. However, My City Hall can be entered during the Night, making it useful for storage or emergency shelter from Darkness.

Tax Collection

The City Hall allows the player to collect taxes from their townsfolk every 10 days. On the morning of a tax day, the character will indicate it is time to collect taxes. A player collects a single Oinc from each resident of Town Houses they built themselves. Tax collection does not take place if the player is too far away from the City Hall. The player will not receive Oincs from missed tax collections.

Decor

  • Queen AnFace Art
  • Queen Profile Art
  • Bookcase Black
  • Corner floor Arc
  • Mayor Table
  • Wall Mirror

Pillar

  • Round Wall Front
  • Cityhall Wall Corner

Lamps

  • Basic Lantern Sidewall

Windows

Doors

  • Exit

Bugs

  • Dying in a different world (any of the three DLC realms, as well as caves, ruins, and the volcano) and respawning from a Meat Effigy or Magic Flower that was placed inside any Hamlet DLC interior (Slanty Shanty etc.) will cause the player to be respawned out in the void of the world holding the respawn structure. It is recommended to use the command c_warp("prefab") to teleport the character back into the world, as walking back in can be problematic for world types such as Shipwrecked.

Gallery

  • The interior of the Swinesbury City Hall.
  • The interior of a My City Hall.
  • Wickerbottom receiving taxes.
  • Swinesbury City Hall With Snow
  • Destroyed
  • Swinesbury City Hall Destroyed Snow
  • Old Swinesbury City Hall Table
StructuresCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam

DSTDSRoGSWHam

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tòa thị chính Swinesbury là một Cấu trúc Cửa hàng Lợn sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy ở Swinesbury Pig City và bán nhiều loại giấy phép và hợp đồng cho người chơi.

The '''Swinesbury City Hall''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in [[Pig City|Swinesbury Pig City]] and sells a variety of permits and contracts to the player.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering the Swinesbury City Hall, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. Additionally, [[Pig Traders/Mayor Truffleston|Mayor Truffleston]] wanders around the room.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the City Hall which will be restocked by the Mayor except for the [[Deed of home ownership]]:

|choose = wx78}}Upon obtaining the [[Key to the City]] in the [[Palace]], the player will be able to craft their own City Hall. It is found in the [[City Planning Tab]], and requires four [[Boards]], four [[Gold Nugget]]s and four [[Pig Skin]]s to craft. Building a City Hall will allow the player to become the Mayor of their own [[Pig City]].

===[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior ===
The structure's interior will be similar to the Mayor Truffleston's house, except for the selling displays not being present. Similar to the [[Slanty Shanty]], one may build [[Structures]] within their City Hall. However, My City Hall can be entered during the [[Night]], making it useful for storage or emergency shelter from [[Darkness]].

==={{Pic32|Oinc}} Tax Collection ===
The City Hall allows the player to collect taxes from their townsfolk every 10 days. On the morning of a tax day, the character will indicate it is time to collect taxes. A player collects a single Oinc from each resident of [[Town House]]s they built themselves. Tax collection does not take place if the player is too far away from the City Hall. The player will not receive Oincs from missed tax collections.

== {{pic|32|Mosquito}} Bugs==
*Dying in a different world (any of the three DLC realms, as well as [[caves]], [[ruins]], and the [[volcano]]) and respawning from a [[Meat Effigy]] or [[Magic Flower]] that was placed inside any [[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]] DLC interior ([[Slanty Shanty]] etc.) will cause the player to be respawned out in the void of the world holding the respawn structure. It is recommended to use the command c_warp("''prefab''") to teleport the character back into the world, as walking back in can be problematic for world types such as [[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]].
